metadata.file_name: Elton John - I Guess That's Why They Call It The Blues.flac
metadata.title: I Guess That's Why They Call It The Blues
metadata.lyrics:
[00:12.91] Don't wish it away
[00:15.34] Don't look at it like it's forever
[00:22.56] Between you and me
[00:26.22] I could honestly say
[00:28.62] That things can only get better
[00:34.43] And while I'm away
[00:39.11] Dust out the demons inside
[00:44.17] And it won't be long before you and me run
[00:49.02] To the place in our hearts where we hide
[00:59.43] And I guess that's why they call it the blues
[01:04.43] Time on my hands could be time spent with you
[01:10.49] Laughin' like children, livin' like lovers
[01:16.55] Rollin' like thunder under the covers
[01:23.39] And I guess that's why they call it the blues
[01:30.64] 
[01:33.54] Just stare into space
[01:36.09] Picture my face in your hands
[01:43.47] Live for each second without hesitation
[01:48.98] And never forget I'm your man
[01:55.38] Wait on me, girl
[01:59.60] Cry in the night if it helps
[02:04.63] But more than ever, I simply love you
[02:10.07] More than I love life itself
[02:19.86] And I guess that's why they call it the blues
[02:24.96] Time on my hands could be time spent with you
[02:30.92] Laughin' like children, livin' like lovers
[02:36.95] Rollin' like thunder under the covers
[02:43.63] And I guess that's why they call it the blues
[02:50.56] 
[03:15.87] Wait on me, girl
[03:20.11] Cry in the night if it helps
[03:25.15] But more than ever, I simply love you
[03:30.88] More than I love life itself
[03:40.43] And I guess that's why they call it the blues
[03:45.49] Time on my hands could be time spent with you
[03:51.45] Laughin' like children, livin' like lovers
[03:57.56] Rollin' like thunder under the covers
[04:04.61] And I guess that's why they call it the blues
[04:08.78] (Laughing like children, living like lovers)
[04:13.67] And I guess that's why they call it the blues
[04:17.70] (Laughing like children, living like lovers)
[04:22.11] And I guess that's why they call it the blues
[04:28.84] 
[04:31.20] And I guess that's why they call it the blues
